# ERP Integration API

**Layer:** Support | **Pattern:** Anti-Corruption Layer (Adapter)
**BIAN:** FinancialAccounting + ContractorandSupplierAgreement (reference)
**Generated by:** GitHub Copilot – Claude Sonnet 4.6

## Purpose

Isolates the AP domain from ERP integration details. Handles supplier validation lookups and accounting entry registration with retry and circuit breaker patterns.

## Endpoints

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | /erp/suppliers/{supplierId}/validate | Validate supplier is active |
| POST | /erp/accounting/entries | Post ledger entry to ERP |

## Integration Details

- **Protocol:** REST/HTTP to ERP
- **Auth:** OAuth2 client_credentials
- **Transport:** TLS 1.2+
- **Supplier cache TTL:** 5 minutes

## Resilience

- Retry: exponential backoff, max 3 attempts
- Circuit breaker: opens after 5 failures (30s timeout)
